/// <summary>

/// </summary>
partial class OrderMapper
    : global::Arbiter.Mapping.MapperProfile<global::TestApp.Models.Order, global::TestApp.Models.OrderModel>
{
    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override global::TestApp.Models.OrderModel? Map(global::TestApp.Models.Order? source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            return default;

        return new global::TestApp.Models.OrderModel
        {
            CustomerName = source.Customer?.Name ?? string.Empty,
            CustomerCode = source.Customer?.Code ?? default!,
        };
    }

    /// <inheritdoc />
    [MethodImpl(MethodImplOptions.AggressiveInlining)]
    public override void Map(global::TestApp.Models.Order source, global::TestApp.Models.OrderModel destination)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        if (destination is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(destination));

        destination.CustomerName = source.Customer?.Name ?? string.Empty;
        destination.CustomerCode = source.Customer?.Code ?? default!;
    }

    private static readonly System.Linq.Expressions.Expression<Func<global::TestApp.Models.Order, global::TestApp.Models.OrderModel>> _projectExpression =
        src => new global::TestApp.Models.OrderModel
        {
            CustomerName = src.Customer != null ? src.Customer.Name : string.Empty,
            CustomerCode = src.Customer != null ? src.Customer.Code : default!,
        };

    /// <inheritdoc />
    public override IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.OrderModel> ProjectTo(IQueryable<global::TestApp.Models.Order> source)
    {
        if (source is null)
            throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(source));

        return source.Select(_projectExpression);
    }

}
